description: Calculate Fleiss' Kappa and Percentage Agreement for inter-rater reliability using the psychiatric diagnoses dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/diagnoses.csv. Analyze the six rater columns ('rater1' through 'rater6') and save the analysis file to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/diagnosis_reliability.jasp. Create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/reliability_report.txt containing the Kappa value rounded to 3 decimal places and its interpretation based on Landis & Koch benchmarks (<0: Poor, 0-0.2: Slight, 0.2-0.4: Fair, 0.4-0.6: Moderate, 0.6-0.8: Substantial, 0.8-1: Almost Perfect).
